title: Establish an Australian native stingless bee colony
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Establish an Australian native stingless bee colony demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Recognise common Australian native stingless bees suitable for domestication

pcs.text: Recognise common Australian native bees and their nesting habits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise common Australian native bees and their nesting habits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise common Australian native bees and their nesting habits.

pcs.text: Recognise common ANSB species suitable for domestication for a specified location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise common ANSB species suitable for domestication for a specified location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise common ANSB species suitable for domestication for a specified location.

pcs.text: Select a species of ANSB and identify the environmental conditions required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select a species of ANSB and identify the environmental conditions required.

pcs.text: Prepare a basic management strategy for establishing and maintaining ANSBs for a defined purpose

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a basic management strategy for establishing and maintaining ANSBs for a defined purpose.

elements.title: Set up an ANSB colony

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor native bee colony for desired development and take remedial action to rectify development problems.
